meta.title: 2erre SRL — Digital partner for Italian businesses
meta.description: Software, web and mobile development, AI consulting and custom tools to grow your business.

hero.subtitle: We design, build and scale software, web and mobile products for Italian SMBs.

services.subtitle: From consulting to product: we build with you or hand you the keys.

consulting.title: Consulting & Strategy
consulting.body: We map processes, identify bottlenecks and build a pragmatic technical roadmap for digital growth.

web.title: Web & Brand
web.body: Fast, SEO-ready, fully responsive sites on modern stacks (Next.js, Tailwind) designed to convert.

apps.title: iOS & Android apps
apps.body: Native and React Native apps, from prototype to store release, with CI/CD, analytics and crash reporting.

ai.title: AI & Automation
ai.body: We bring LLMs into your processes: WhatsApp/Slack agents, knowledge bases, automations with Make, n8n, Zapier.

products.subtitle: Tools built by us — try free once.

qr.name: QR Studio
qr.body: Dynamic QRs with analytics, branding and redirects. First QR free, then sign up.

calc.name: Quote estimator
calc.body: Website, app, MVP or custom service: real-time estimate based on scope and timing.

paycheck.name: Payroll calculator
paycheck.body: Simulator with up-to-date Italian tax rates, for employer and employee.

cases.subtitle: How we helped Italian SMBs grow online.

odora.challenge: A complex fragrance catalog to navigate and stagnant conversion.
odora.solution: UX discovery, redesign of the choice flow and Shopify checkout optimization.

balance.challenge: Personal finance app to launch with tight timeline and coherent cross-platform design.
balance.solution: Product design, interactive prototypes, React Native build and gamified onboarding.

generale.challenge: Industrial operations based on paper and Excel misaligned across locations.
generale.solution: Custom web portal + automations integrated with ERP and warehouse.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project.
contact.subtitle: Fill out the form and we'll get back within 24h for a discovery call.

fields.name: Full name
fields.source: How did you hear about us

contact.error: Error while sending. Try again or write to info@2erre.it.

newsletter.title: Stay in the loop.
newsletter.subtitle: Monthly newsletter on AI, product and growth — no spam, promise.

footer.tagline: The digital partner of your business.

tools.subtitle: Free mini-apps to simplify your work.

qr.subtitle: Create a QR in one click. First use is free.
qr.locked: Sign up to create unlimited QRs.

paycheck.title: Net Salary Calculator (Italy)
paycheck.subtitle: From annual gross estimate your monthly net per Italian IRPEF rates.
paycheck.disclaimer: Indicative simulation based on Italian IRPEF brackets 2024 and average rates. Not a substitute for a real payslip. For your specific case consult a labor advisor.
paycheck.locked: Sign up to keep using this tool.

quote.title: Project Quote Estimator
quote.subtitle: Answer 4 questions and get an indicative estimate for your digital project.

results.title: Indicative estimate
results.includes: Includes: discovery, design, development, test, release.
results.disclaimer: Ballpark estimate. Final quote depends on scope, stack and constraints. Book a free call with us.

about.title: 2erre SRL — digital, pragmatic, Italian.
about.body: We're an Italian software house specialized in digital products for SMBs. Born at the intersection of engineering and design, with the goal of building useful, fast and sustainable things.

v1.title: Pragmatic
v1.body: Clear scope, short milestones, zero over-engineering.

v2.title: Transparent
v2.body: Your code, honest estimates, weekly reports.

v3.title: Durable
v3.body: Standard stack, zero lock-in, long-term maintainability.
